frame_analyses.description: Initial view of trainer with monopolar cautery and grasper visible. Gauze appears suspended between clamps with circular pattern marked.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard setup visible, instruments properly positioned

frame_analyses.description: Monopolar cautery approaching gauze, grasper stabilizing material. Beginning to initiate cut at what appears to be 12 o'clock position.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good coordination between instruments, cautery tip approaching marked line

frame_analyses.description: Actively cutting along the circular pattern, progressing clockwise. Cautery creating clean cut line.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Steady progression, maintaining proximity to marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise cut, approximately at 3 o'clock position. Grasper repositioning to maintain tension.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good instrument coordination, maintaining cutting rhythm

frame_analyses.description: Cutting progressing toward 6 o'clock position. Cut line appears to track close to marked circle.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Consistent cutting speed, maintaining line proximity

frame_analyses.description: Final frames of video - task appears complete or nearly complete. Cut circle visible in gauze.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion achieved, circular cut evident

confidence_rationale: Video quality and camera angle make precise deviation measurements difficult to assess. Time estimation is based on visible frames but actual completion time unclear. Task appears successfully completed but penalty assessment is limited.
cannot_determine: Precise deviation measurements at cardinal points - camera angle and resolution insufficient
Exact completion time - video may not show complete task duration
Detailed line deviation penalties - markings not clearly visible for measurement
technique_summary: Efficient expert-level performance with rapid task completion. Smooth cutting technique with good instrument coordination. Time of 22 seconds places this in expert range.
strengths: Very fast completion time indicating expertise
Good coordination between cautery and grasper
improvement_suggestions: Video quality insufficient to provide specific technical feedback on line precision
